source_intent.raw_intent: Case 074: I am a law_firm_operator in European Union. Build a srx_ace_audit_agent for audit_agent using the operator_lens. Chaos input type is artifact_type_ambiguity. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build an SRX ACE audit agent for a European Union law firm operator that validates artifact type consistency, enforces governance gates, and produces an SR8-compilable directive from ambiguous, urgent, and partial input. Scope: - The agent shall ingest a raw intent with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria; apply operator_lens to resolve artifact_type_ambiguity; generate a governed artifact with explicit validation gates; output a structured directive containing objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Constraints: - Must comply with EU data protection and legal professional privilege requirements. - All validation gates must be explicit and auditable. - Output must be SR8-compilable with no markdown fences. - Artifact type must be srx_ace_audit_agent. - Depth tier must be D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE. - Runtime target must be Codex. Success Criteria: - Artifact type matches expected_artifact_type. - Depth tier matches expected_depth_tier. - Runtime target matches expected_runtime_target. - All SR8 required sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract) are present and well-formed. - Validation gates are explicitly defined and traceable. - No markdown fences in final output. Output Contract: - format: strict JSON - fields: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent - compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object - validation_gates: Gate 1: Input parsing and ambiguity resolution.; Gate 2: Artifact type and depth tier enforcement.; Gate 3: Constraint compliance check (EU law, SR8 rules).; Gate 4: Output structure validation against schema.; Gate 5: Final audit log generation.
